title: hello world
body: this is my first blog on my own portfolio and i hope anyone reading this had an amazing day today!!

title: Still figuring it out
excerpt: A little hello from the crossroads of creative stuff and nerdy stuff.
body:
Hey, I'm Kia. This is where I'll post about life, projects, flops, wins, and whatever I'm experimenting with next.

If you found this, welcome. More soon.
